channel.title: Agents on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Agents on Arrans github.io

item.title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
item.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

item.title: eosphoros-ai/DB-GPT
item.description: open-source agentic AI data assistant for the next generation of AI + Data products.

item.title: TM9657/flow-like
item.description: Flow-Like: Strongly Typed Enterprise Scale Workflows. Built for scalability, speed, seamless AI integration and rich customization.

item.title: getmaxun/maxun
item.description: 🔥 The open-source no-code platform for web scraping, crawling, search and AI data extraction • Turn websites into structured APIs in minutes 🔥

item.title: run-llama/llama_index
item.description: LlamaIndex is the leading document agent and OCR platform

item.title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
item.description: Collection of awesome LLM apps with AI Agents and RAG using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and opensource models.

item.title: mudler/LocalAI
item.description: LocalAI is the open-source AI engine. Run any model - LLMs, vision, voice, image, video - on any hardware. No GPU required.

item.title: dagger/dagger
item.description: Automation engine to build, test and ship any codebase. Runs locally, in CI, or directly in the cloud

item.title: golemcloud/golem
item.description: Golem Cloud is the agent-native platform for building AI agents and distributed applications that never lose state, never duplicate work, and never require you to build infrastructure.

item.title: agentheroes/agentheroes
item.description: Generate, animate and schedule your AI characters 🤖

item.title: ammaarreshi/SkyRoads-Codex
item.description: Reverse engineering a DOS game with no source code using Codex 5.4
